docket_entries.description: REMARK: DOCUMENTS EXHIBITS FOR TELEPHONIC HEARING
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $0.00 SERVED JUL-31-2020, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT KESER, MARINA

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-05-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAY-14-2021 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF SIEERRA HAWWORTH IS PRESENT VIA TELEPHONIC APPEARANCE, COURTCALL. DEFENDANT MARINA KESER IS NOT PRESENT. DISCLOSURE IS MADE. PARTIES SUBMITTED SIGNED STIPULATIONS OF A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT: DEFENDANT WILL MAKE PAYMENTS OF $535.18 ON THE 1ST OF EACH MONTH FOR A TOTAL OF 6 PAYMENTS. THE 1ST PAYMENT WAS ON FEB-01-2021 AND THE LAST PAYMENT WILL BE ON JUL-01-2021. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE MAY-14-2021 HEARING IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE, AT WHICH TIME A JUDGMENT WILL BE ISSUED FOR THE REMAINING BALANCE. IF NO APPEARANCES AT THE MAY HEARING, A FINAL PROGRESS REPORT DATE WILL BE ENTERED AFTER JUL-01-2021. IF NO APPEARANCES AT THE FINAL PROGRESS REPORT HEARING THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,211.08 FILED BY HAWORTH, SIERRA AS TO DEFENDANT KESER, MARINA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-05-2021 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE - GRANTED FILED BY PLAINTIFF HAWORTH, SIERRA
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE FILED BY PLAINTIFF HAWORTH, SIERRA

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. COMMISSIONER: PANG LY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
